name: Net
description_short: Merriam-Webster is a dictionary publisher, not a consumer finance company. This profile cannot be completed as submitted.
description_long: CRITICAL ISSUE: The website provided (https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/net) is the Merriam-Webster Dictionary entry for the word "net," not a financial services company. Merriam-Webster, established in 1828, is a reference publisher specializing in dictionaries and language resources. The website content contains only definitional entries, etymologies, synonyms, and usage examples for the English word "net" across its various grammatical forms and meanings. There is no financial product, service, lending offering, or consumer finance operation present on this website. The company does not offer payday alternatives, loans, credit repair, debt relief, or any other financial service. Categorizing this entry as a payday-alternative lender is fundamentally incorrect. This appears to be either a data entry error, a test case, or a misunderstanding of the company being profiled. Merriam-Webster operates as an educational and reference resource publisher, not a financial services provider. No accurate consumer finance profile can be generated from dictionary content. The submission requires correction with a valid fintech or financial services company URL and information.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
